rule_metadata.author: oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova
rule_metadata.title: Potential Credential Dumping Attempt Via PowerShell

rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Credential Dumping Attempt Via PowerShell
id: 0f920ebe-7aea-4c54-b202-9aa0c609cfe5
related:
- id: 3f07b9d1-2082-4c56-9277-613a621983cc
  type: obsolete
- id: fb656378-f909-47c1-8747-278bf09f4f4f
  type: similar
status: test
description: Detects a PowerShell process requesting access to "lsass.exe", which
  can be indicative of potential credential dumping attempts
references:
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-powershell-abuse
author: oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova
date: 2020-10-06
modified: 2023-11-28
tags:
- attack.credential-access
- attack.t1003.001
- detection.threat-hunting
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_access
detection:
  selection:
    SourceImage|endswith:
    - \powershell.exe
    - \pwsh.exe
    TargetImage|endswith: \lsass.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
